DP.358.0000:
DJ: Gotta catch ’em all!
It’s the Catch That Pokémon Show!\f
So, let me tell you about this show’s
featured Pokémon-catching Trainer.\f
The Trainer that caught our eye with
a dandy of a catch is none other\r
than the inestimable [0103,0000]!\f
And what, you may ask yourself, did
[0103,0000] catch?\f
Why, none other than a mighty fine
[0100,0001]!\f
Nice one, [0103,0000]!
That’s one slick takedown!\f
The Pokémon was nabbed with an
expertly tossed [0108,0002].\f
And out of [0134,0003] thrown, it was
the very last one!\f
Lame joking aside, we’re talking about
one great Trainer in [0103,0000]!\f
...Oh? Hang on a second...
I’ve got a hot new update!\f
We just got told what [0103,0000]
nicknamed the caught [0100,0001]!\f
The nickname’s [0101,0004]!
Yow, [0103,0000]!\f
You’re the last word in cool!
You’re so cool, you’re absolute zero!\f
Listen up, folks!
You go out and emulate [0103,0000]!\f
Get out there and catch Pokémon
like there’s no tomorrow!
DP.358.0001:
DJ: Gotta catch ’em all!
It’s the Catch That Pokémon Show!\f
So, let me tell you about this show’s
featured Pokémon-catching Trainer.\f
The Trainer that caught our eye with
a dandy of a catch is none other\r
than the inestimable [0103,0000]!\f
And what, you may ask yourself, did
[0103,0000] catch?\f
Why, none other than a mighty fine
[0100,0001]!\f
Nice one, [0103,0000]!
That’s one slick takedown!\f
The Pokémon was nabbed with an
expertly tossed [0108,0002].\f
And out of [0134,0003] thrown, it was
the very last one!\f
Lame joking aside, we’re talking about
one great Trainer in [0103,0000]!\f
...Oh? Hang on a second...
I’ve got a hot new update!\f
It turns out [0103,0000] opted not
to nickname the [0100,0001]!\f
Yow, [0103,0000]!
That is so nihilistically cool!\f
Listen up, folks!
You go out and emulate [0103,0000]!\f
Get out there and catch Pokémon
like there’s no tomorrow!
DP.358.0002:
DJ: Gotta catch ’em all!
It’s the Catch That Pokémon Show!\f
So, let me tell you about this show’s
featured Pokémon-catching Trainer.\f
The Trainer that caught our eye with
a dandy of a catch is none other\r
than the inestimable [0103,0000]!\f
And what, you may ask yourself, did
[0103,0000] catch?\f
The Pokémon was a...
...Huh? Hold on, here...\f
[0103,0000] blew this catch
completely...\f
Not one Ball out of the [0134,0001] thrown
did the job...\f
And [0103,0000] ended up making
the quarry faint...\f
Oh, what a major downer...\f
This is too tragic to be a good
news piece...\f
[0103,0000]!
Don’t let it get you down!\f
Forget about that Pokémon!
It wasn’t meant to be yours!\f
Sinnoh is jam-packed with Pokémon
waiting for a Trainer like you!

DP.358.0004:
MC: Welcome to another episode of
What’s Fishing? Trainers with Rods.\f
As always, we have the Fishing Master
as our guest speaker.\f
Fishing Master: Hm!\f
MC: Today, we look at [0103,0000]’s
attempts at fishing...\f
Using a trusty [0108,0001], 
[0103,0000] caught a feisty\r
[0100,0002]!\f
Fishing Master: Hm!\f
MC: Fishing Master, how would you
rate [0103,0000] as an angler?\f
Fishing Master: Hm! The handling of
the rod is confident, yet delicate!\f
Need I say it?
This Trainer gets an undisputed 100!\f
MC: A perfect 100!
Congratulations, [0103,0000]!\f
Until next time!
Keep on fishing!
DP.358.0005:
MC: Welcome to another episode of
What’s Fishing? Trainers with Rods.\f
As always, we have the Fishing Master
as our guest speaker.\f
Fishing Master: Hm!\f
MC: Today, we look at [0103,0000]’s
attempts at fishing...\f
...Well, it looks like [0103,0000]
had the quarry slip away...\f
Fishing Master: Hm!\f
MC: Fishing Master, how would you
rate [0103,0000] as an angler?\f
Fishing Master: Hm! [0103,0000] puts
no spine into holding the rod.\f
The lack of passion is obvious!
This Trainer rates only a generous 5!\f
MC: Ouch! Just 5 points!
[0103,0000], try harder!\f
Until next time!
Keep on fishing!
DP.358.0006:
MC: It’s time for the Love That Group
Corner.\f
Today, we have the Group Maniac back
as a guest speaker.\f
Group Maniac: Yeahah!\f
MC: We’ve heard that [0103,0000]
has switched allegiances to a group\r
named [013D,0001].\f
What’s your take on this startling
new development?\f
Group Maniac: Yeahah!
Does it really matter any which way?\f
MC: You’re making a lot of sense!
Tune in next time!
DP.358.0010:
Newscaster: We bring you this
breaking news story.\f
While traveling in the vicinity of
[0104,0000], [0103,0001]\r
discovered a hidden [0108,0002].\f
The methodology employed by
[0103,0001] is unknown.\f
Eyewitnesses report [0103,0001]
appeared to be very furtive.\f
[0103,0001] reportedly scanned the
area often, as if fearing detection.\f
This concludes this special news
story.
DP.358.0012:
MC: It’s time for the Happy-Happy
Egg Club.\f
I just want to report [0103,0000]’s
Egg hatched around [0104,0001].\f
[0103,0000] now has a baby
[0100,0002]!\f
[0103,0000], congratulations!
Be good to your new family member!\f
Till next time, adieu!
DP.358.0017:
MC: Does changing nicknames change
attributes? We decide for you!\f
It’s time for Rate That Name Change
once again!\f
In the spotlight today is the Trainer
[0103,0000]’s [0100,0001].\f
[0103,0000] chose the nickname
[0101,0002].\f
Let’s get an expert assessment
from our appraiser. How is it?\f
Appraiser: ...How should I say this?
Fine, I’ll be blunt.\f
The nickname [0101,0002] is
magnificence itself!\f
[0101,0002] will surely grow more
attractive.\f
But, it comes at a price!
[0103,0000] will be mired in bogs!\f
MC: [0103,0000], changing your
Pokémon’s nickname was a great idea!\f
Try giving lots and lots of Poffins
to [0101,0002], too.\f
Oh, but beware if you ever travel to
the Great Marsh!\f
Until next time, farewell!

DP.358.0021:
MC: Does changing nicknames change
attributes? We decide for you!\f

from our appraiser. How is it?\f

[0101,0002] is going to become
happier as time goes on.\f

[0103,0000] will be mired in bogs!\f

[0101,0002] is going to become
happier! It makes me sort of envious!\f
Oh, but beware if you ever travel to
the Great Marsh!\f
Until next time, farewell!
DP.358.0024:
MC: You’ve just tuned in to the
Underground Treasures Corner.\f
We have a Ruin Maniac with us as
our guest again.\f
Ruin Maniac: Hi!
Hope you’re digging this!\f
MC: Today, we bring you a report on
[0103,0000], who dug up a nice\r
[0119,0001] underground.\f
Ruin Maniac: There’re plenty of
treasures waiting to be discovered.\f
It’s not surprising to see something
like that [0119,0001].\f
MC: May I say something? You haven’t
had much success with treasures...\f
Ruin Maniac: Now that’s a low blow.
I’ve been digging away...\f
MC: Let’s hope [0103,0000] will
keep on digging hidden treasures\r
underground.\f
Until next time...
Keep on digging!
DP.358.0026:
Newscaster: We bring you this special
news bulletin.\f
The Trainer [0103,0000] was
witnessed catching Pokémon in\r
the Great Marsh.\f
It is believed the Trainer visited
the area while traveling throughout\r
Sinnoh.\f
Witnesses report [0103,0000] first
caught a snarly [0100,0001].\f
Apparently delighted by that catch,
[0103,0000] kept at the Safari Game.\f
In the end, [0103,0000] reportedly
caught [0133,0002] Pokémon.\f
This concludes this special news
bulletin.
DP.358.0029:
Newscaster: We bring you this
developing news story.\f
The Trainer [0103,0000] has been
traveling throughout Sinnoh.\f
We’ve received credible reports that
they’ve been giving the\f
herbal medicine [0108,0002] to
the naturally reluctant [0100,0001].\f
Witnesses report [0100,0001] making
disgusted faces over the medicine’s\r
awful flavor.\f
However, [0103,0000] appeared not
to notice the Pokémon’s revulsion.\f
This concludes this news report.
DP.358.0030:
MC: It’s time for the Planting and
Watering Show for Berry Gardeners.\f
We bring you this show with the
Berry Guru as our returning guest.\f
Berry Guru: Ayup, ayup.\f
MC: Today, we look at [0103,0000]’s
[0108,0001] plant.\f
It appears to have been nurtured
with utmost care.\f
Berry Guru: Ayup!
The plant bore [0133,0002] Berries!\f
[0103,0000] has a brilliant knack for
planting and watering Berries.\f
MC: My hat’s off to you,
[0103,0000]!\f
See you again!
DP.358.0031:
MC: It’s time for the Planting and
Watering Show for Berry Gardeners.\f
We bring you this show with the
Berry Guru as our returning guest.\f
Berry Guru: Ayup, ayup.\f
MC: Today, we look at [0103,0000]’s
[0108,0001] plant.\f
It appears to have been rather
neglected...\f
Berry Guru: Ayup!
The plant bore next to no Berries!\f
MC: Can you offer any advice?\f
Berry Guru: Water!
You’ve got to water plants often.\f
Watch the color of the soil, and
don’t be shy about watering.\f
MC: [0103,0000], heed the Berry
Guru’s sage advice!\f
See you again!
DP.358.0032:
MC: It’s time for the Love That Group
Corner.\f
Today, we have the Group Maniac back
as a guest speaker.\f
Group Maniac: Yeahah!\f
MC: We’ve heard that [0103,0000]
has made a new group named [013D,0001].\f
What’s your take on this startling
new development?\f
Group Maniac: Yeahah! Sounds A-OK to
me. Group [013D,0001]!\f
MC: You’re making a lot of sense!
Tune in next time!
DP.358.0033:
MC: It’s now time for the Seal Club
Show.\f
Joining us as our guest once again
is the Seal Master.\f
Seal Master: Greetings.\f
MC: Today, we examine a Ball Capsule
crafted by [0103,0000].\f
Seal Master: Hmm...
Remarkable...\f
The [0108,0001] scattered on
the Capsule...\f
Though they may appear to have been
randomly applied, you can’t fool me.\f
The Seals are cleverly applied in
a meticulously calculated manner...\f
Hm!
And what’s this?!\f
The Pokémon inside...!
It’s this [0100,0002]?!\f
The Trainer crafted this Ball Capsule
to best highlight the Pokémon’s\r
emergence from the Ball!\f
MC: There you have it!
Even our Seal Master is impressed!\f
To see [0103,0000]’s Ball Capsules,
challenge the Trainer to a battle!\f
Let’s meet again, same channel,
same time!
DP.358.0034:
MC: It’s now time for the Seal Club
Show.\f
Joining us as our guest once again
is the Seal Master.\f
Seal Master: Greetings.\f
MC: Today, we examine a Ball Capsule
crafted by [0103,0000].\f
Seal Master: This is rubbish...
Such a foolish waste of Seals...\f
It’s true that [0108,0001] is
fantastic. That’s a given.\f
But applied in such a position, its
true beauty is obscured...\f
...Hm?\f
Wait...
It can’t be...\f
What is this?!\f
The Pokémon inside...!
It’s this [0100,0002]?!\f
With this [0100,0002], this
[0108,0001]’s placement actually\r
enhances its beauty!\f
Did [0103,0000] position this
[0108,0001] intending to use the\r
Capsule on the [0100,0002]?\f
The cheekiness of it all!\f
How dare that [0103,0000] pull
such an insolent ruse!\f
MC: There you have it!
Even our Seal Master is upset!\f
To see [0103,0000]’s Ball Capsules,
challenge the Trainer to a battle!\f
Let’s meet again, same channel,
same time!
DP.358.0035:
MC: It’s now time for the Seal Club
Show.\f
Joining us as our guest once again
is the Seal Master.\f
Seal Master: Greetings.\f
MC: Today, we examine a Ball Capsule
crafted by [0103,0000].\f
Seal Master: Hmm... The Trainer paid
attention to the fundamentals in\r
applying the [0108,0001].\f
[0103,0000]’s meticulous sense
of craftsmanship is obvious...\f
And inside this Ball Capsule is...
What’s this?! This [0100,0002]?!\f
Wahaha! That [0103,0000]!
Well done, indeed!\f
MC: There you have it!
Even our Seal Master is satisfied!\f
To see [0103,0000]’s Ball Capsules,
challenge the Trainer to a battle!\f
Let’s meet again, same channel,
same time!
DP.358.0036:
Newscaster: The time has come!
It’s the Capture-the-Flag Digest!\f
Back as our guest is the Flag Maniac!\f
Flag Maniac: Howdy-do!\f
Newscaster: Today, we examine news
of [0103,0000] capturing\r
[0103,0001]’s Flag.\f
Flag Maniac, how do you view this
development?\f
Flag Maniac: Beaten to the punch!
I was after [0103,0001]’s Flag, too!\f
But, I’ve also got my eyes out for
[0103,0000]’s Flag.\f
Newscaster: That’s our Flag Maniac!
Greed oozes from your comments!\f
[0103,0000], you’d better keep
a good eye on your Secret Base!\f
Good-bye until next time!
DP.358.0037:
Newscaster: The time has come!
It’s the Capture-the-Flag Digest!\f
Back as our guest is the Flag Maniac!\f
Flag Maniac: Howdy-do!\f
Newscaster: Today, we examine news
of [0103,0000] having their Flag\r
taken by [0103,0001].\f
Flag Maniac, how do you view this
development?\f
Flag Maniac: Oh, it hurts!
Losing a Flag eats at your heart!\f
It hurts me too because I’ve been
after [0103,0000]’s Flag, too!\f
But, I’ve also got my eyes out for
[0103,0001]’s Flag.\f
Newscaster: That’s our Flag Maniac!
Greed oozes from your comments!\f
[0103,0000], here’s hoping you
recover your Flag!\f
Good-bye until next time!
